articles.title: Kraken sues crypto derivatives firm PowerTrade over 'misappropriated' funds claim
articles.description: PowerTrade changed Kraken’s positive balance of around $7 million to a $2 million deficit via a series of unauthorized “corrections” related to trades that had expired or settled months earlier, according to a legal filing.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: AAVE gains 10.1% as index rises
articles.description: Bitcoin Cash (BCH), up 5.8% from Wednesday, joined Aave (AAVE) as a top performer.

articles.title: SBI to acquire Bitbank in $289M deal creating Japan's biggest crypto exchange
articles.description: The Japanese financial conglomerate plans to take full control of Bitbank as it expands an ecosystem spanning crypto trading, stablecoins, tokenization and blockchain infrastructure.

articles.title: About 60% of World Cup bettors on Polymarket are first-time crypto users
articles.description: Polymarket emerged as an onboarding layer for about 60% of World Cup bettors, who interacted with the blockchain for the first time during their prediction market entry.

articles.title: Spark migrates $150M in stablecoin to Uniswap to advance shared liquidity
articles.description: Spark deployed approximately $150 million across two Uniswap v4 pools on Ethereum, while its DualPool hook and Shared Liquidity Layer are planned for later phases.

articles.title: Uniswap, Spark aim to build stablecoin FX market as banks, fintechs enter the industry
articles.description: The protocols are building shared liquidity and trading infrastructure for a future with hundreds of competing digital currencies on blockchain rails.

articles.title: Post-prison CZ says time behind bars didn't hurt the billionaire's business after Binance
articles.description: The pardoned ex-CEO called prison a character-building "plus" as he's pursued a venture-capital career, despite his majority stake in the world's biggest crypto exchange.

articles.title: $47M in Crypto Frozen in Global Infostealer Takedown: Europol
articles.description: Police disrupted SocGholish, Amadey, and StealC, malware that harvests crypto wallets and passwords, freezing €41 million in crypto.

articles.title: Circle and Nomura join forces to target a $440 billion daily foreign exchange market in Japan
articles.description: The stablecoin giant and the Japanese financial corporation plan to deploy cross-border foreign exchange settlements as early as next year.

articles.title: Binance faces EU service limits next week as MiCA rules take effect
articles.description: Binance will limit EU onboarding and services from July 1 under MiCA rules after failing to gain authorization from a member state, while withdrawals remain available for users.

articles.title: Morning Minute: Strategy’s MSTR and STRC Crash to 52-Week Lows
articles.description: A massive Micron earnings beat has lifted global markets, pushing crypto higher after yesterday's nasty sell off took BTC sub-$60k.

articles.title: Circle, Nomura eye Japan corporate FX with stablecoin settlement: Report
articles.description: Circle and Nomura are reportedly partnering to enable stablecoin-based foreign exchange settlement for Japanese companies as the country's regulated blockchain-based financial infrastructure expands.

articles.title: Bitcoin derivatives signal panic. A weak core PCE reading could trigger snapback.
articles.description: Your day-ahead look for June 25, 2026

articles.title: CoinEx denies claims it served as $3.84 billion gateway to sanctioned Iranian crypto firms
articles.description: Blockchain analysts TRM Labs says CoinEx facilitated more than $3.8 billion in blockchain-traced flows with sanctioned Iranian crypto entities. CoinEx disputes the findings.

articles.title: Crypto relief rally fails to shake persistent bearish derivatives signal
articles.description: A relief rally tied to recovering U.S. equities lifted BTC and ETH off weekly lows, but bearish derivatives positioning and negative CVD suggest the rebound may be fragile.

articles.title: Kalshi Seeks $40B Valuation Weeks After $1B Raise: FT
articles.description: The prediction market seeks a valuation near double the $22 billion it hit last month, as a federal-state fight over regulation escalates.

articles.title: Bitcoin supply in loss reaches record high 10.83 million BTC
articles.description: Almost 11 million bitcoin are now held at a loss, while long-term holders control a record 14.8 million coins.

articles.title: Micron delivers blowout earnings, surges 16% and deals crypto bulls a blow
articles.description: Micron Technology surged after blockbuster earnings and strong guidance, lifting AI memory stocks.

articles.title: Iran-linked entities moved $3.8B through CoinEx, TRM says
articles.description: TRM Labs traced $3.8 billion moved by 60 sanctioned Iranian entities through CoinEx and said that the exchange’s 8% share of illicit transactions was substantially higher than its counterparts.

articles.title: Indonesia sets certification rules for influencers recommending crypto
articles.description: Indonesia’s financial regulator will require influencers recommending crypto and other digital assets to hold relevant certifications as regulators worldwide tighten oversight of finfluencers.

articles.title: Polish crypto exchange Kanga secures MiCA license in Latvia
articles.description: Poland-founded crypto exchange Kanga has secured a Class 3 MiCA license in Latvia, enabling EU-wide crypto services as Polish lawmakers debate framework's implementation.

articles.title: Forget max pain theory. Bitcoin is well below the $72,000 magnet going into $10 billion options expiry
articles.description: The popular max pain theory isn’t working out as bitcoin trades far from the $72K level a day ahead of a $10 billion quarterly options settlement.

articles.title: US arbitration giant rolls out ‘legal layer’ for agentic commerce
articles.description: As agentic AI transactions increase, “we need to know there’s a clear answer to what happens if something goes wrong,” said Mance Harmon, co-founder of Hedera.

articles.title: Live markets: Bitcoin plunges under $59,000 as early bounce fades
articles.description: A liquidation flush took bitcoin to its lowest since early June before Micron's blowout earnings and SK Hynix's U.S. listing plans steadied the AI trade that crypto had been sliding alongside.

articles.title: House Democrats seek SEC answers on AI investment advisers
articles.description: House Democrats have questioned the SEC over trading platforms offering AI agent advisers making “consequential investment decisions on behalf of retail investors.”

articles.title: MemeCore's M token suddenly crashes 80% with no clear trigger
articles.description: The token fell from nearly $3 to about $0.50 in hours, wiping out close to $3 billion in market value, with no exploit or announcement to explain it. Onchain investigator ZachXBT warned in April that M's price had been propped up by insiders.

articles.title: Ripple's RLUSD stablecoin goes live in Japan after regulatory approval
articles.description: Japan's financial regulator cleared the U.S. dollar-backed token as a new category of payment instrument, letting SBI VC Trade offer it to institutions and retail. RLUSD remains small, at about $1.7 billion.

articles.title: Bitcoin has a new line in the sand. Thursday’s core PCE could stress test it.
articles.description: The market has found a new support level and it could be tested following Thursday's U.S. inflation data.

articles.title: XRP slides 2.8% as weak bounce keeps $1 support in focus
articles.description: Sellers broke another support level on heavy volume, while the recovery failed to reclaim the zone that would ease downside pressure.

articles.title: Bitcoin back above $60,000, ETH, SOL recoup losses as AI stocks stage rebound
articles.description: The token fell to about $59,000 before buyers stepped in, but the week's losses are steep across the board. A blowout Micron forecast lifted stocks and oil kept sliding, yet crypto did not follow.

articles.title: Abracadabra takes emergency action as MIM stablecoin depeg worsens

articles.title: Kalshi seeks funding at $40B valuation, nearly doubling last raise: FT
